ginger_grunt.label: Gingerbread grunt
ginger_grunt.desc: A low-tier golem glued with icing—slow, but its bite stings for a while.

snow_spirit.label: Snow spirit
snow_spirit.desc: Snow given a wispy form; cold gusts scrape cheeks and courage alike.

nutcracker.label: Nutcracker guard
nutcracker.desc: A wooden toy soldier with creaking joints—hard shell, swings like a tiny ram.

candy_slime.label: Syrup slime
candy_slime.desc: A slow blob of hot sugar—splashes scald when struck.

coal_golem.label: Coal golem
coal_golem.desc: A sooty construct from the naughty list—fists spark with embers.

elf_archer.label: Workshop elf archer
elf_archer.desc: Tiny crossbow bolts dipped in sleepy syrup—aims for knees.

frost_imp.label: Frost imp
frost_imp.desc: A giggling ice-blue devil that loves stuffing snow down collars.

carol_wraith.label: Carol wraith
carol_wraith.desc: An undead choir that never stays on key—sound cracks shield lacquer.

stocking_mimic.label: Stocking mimic
stocking_mimic.desc: Looks like a gift-stuffed stocking—up close, fangs and a hungry cuff.

yule_treant.label: Yule treant
yule_treant.desc: A whole yule log given legs—branches hung with ornaments that pop.

reindeer_fury.label: Fury reindeer
reindeer_fury.desc: Silvered antlers, glowing nose—charges shake the dungeon.

krampus_shadow.label: Krampus shadow
krampus_shadow.desc: A dungeon echo of the punisher of pranks—whips and dread together.
